open google chrome, open youtube in it, open a mrbeast video as strart from 2:20 minutes

<function=run_command{"command": "start chrome"}></function>
<function=mcp_chrome_navigate_page{"type": "url", "url": "https://www.youtube.com"}></function>
<function=mcp_chrome_evaluate_script{"function": "() => { const url = \"https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=mrbeast\"; window.location.href = url; }"}></function>
<function=mcp_chrome_wait_for{"text": ["MrBeast"]}></function>
<function=mcp_chrome_click{"uid": "video-title"}></function>
<function=mcp_chrome_evaluate_script{"function": "() => { const video = document.querySelector('video'); video.currentTime = 140; }"}></function>
